message:
fix(func): implement localtime/utc modifiers and fix month/year overflow in datetime

Replace the localtime/utc modifier stubs with a working implementation
that computes the system UTC offset by shelling out to `date +%z` once
and caching the result via OnceLock. Explicit TZ=UTC/GMT is detected
without subprocess invocation.

Fix month/year arithmetic to match C SQLite behavior: out-of-range days
now overflow via JDN arithmetic instead of being clamped (e.g. Jan 31
+ 1 month → Mar 2 in a leap year, not Feb 29). This matches C SQLite's
documented behavior where the day value passes through Julian Day Number
conversion unconstrained.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
